name: Beef Chow Fun (Gnow Yoke Chow Fun)
recipeInstructions:
MEAT MARINADE:
Mix flank steak in meat marinade for 1/2 hour.
COOKING:
1. Stir fry green beans in 1 tbsp. oil for 3-4 minutes, adding 2 tbsp. water the last 2 minutes and cover.
2. Set aside.
3. Add 1 tbsp. oil and brown the garlic and ginger.
4. Stir fry beef, drizzle 1 tbsp. of oyster sauce on top.
5. Set aside.
6. Add 2 tbsp. oil and stir fry noodles, turning and adding a little water so they'll soften. It takes about 3-4 minutes. You may find you have to add more water or oil to keep a steady stream of steam to help soften the noodles.
7. Add back the vegetables and meat.
8. Add the rest of the oyster sauce, soy sauce and sesame oil.
